title: chionanthus pauciflorus var. evolutior
intro: Chionanthus pauciflorus var. evolutior, also known as the Chinese fringetree, is a plant species belonging to the family Oleaceae. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Chionanthus pauciflorus var. evolutior include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections, making it a valuable herb in traditional Chinese medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, decoctions, and infusions, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs.
